svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Genesis Voice Pipeline" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-719" dy="-182" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1500" pageHeight="700" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Genesis Voice — pipeline topology & setup map" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="700" x="40" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sl1" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=34;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fafafa;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="1 · Home Assistant — required hardware" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="450" width="340" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ha" parent="sl1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" value="Home Assistant" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="20" y="54" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="esph" parent="sl1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" value="ESPHome add-on
builds + flashes firmware" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="180" y="54" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dev" parent="sl1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;" value="Voice PE device (ESP32)

runs GENesis-Voice firmware" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="260" x="40" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sl2" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=50;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fafafa;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="2 · Voice Edge — a dedicated VM OR a separate container (NOT HAOS, NOT the Genesis container) · for us = the "assistant1" VM" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="450" width="430" x="460" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2s" parent="sl2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="s2s_bridge
pipecat → OpenAI Realtime (conversational)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="370" x="30" y="66" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="amb" parent="sl2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="ambient_bridge
Silero VAD → Zipformer STT → diarization" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="370" x="30" y="166" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="db" parent="sl2" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="ambient.db
isolated · rolling / short-TTL" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="125" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sl3" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=34;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fafafa;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="3 · Genesis — cognitive core" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="450" width="380" x="970" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ivc" parent="sl3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Internal voice code
adapter · /v1/voice/* routes
wyoming_stt · s2s_session · config" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="320" x="30" y="54" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="grt" parent="sl3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Genesis runtime (cognitive core)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="320" x="30" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mem" parent="sl3" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Genesis memory" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="160" x="110" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_esph_dev" edge="1" parent="1" source="esph" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=10;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="dev" value="builds + OTA-flashes firmware"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_amb_db" edge="1" parent="1" source="amb" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="db" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_ivc_grt" edge="1" parent="1" source="ivc" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="grt" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_grt_mem" edge="1" parent="1" source="grt" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="mem" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_dev_s2s" edge="1" parent="1" source="dev" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=10;exitX=1;exitY=0.3;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="s2s" value="WS · 24kHz PCM
wake-word conversational"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_dev_amb" edge="1" parent="1" source="dev" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=10;exitX=1;exitY=0.7;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="amb" value="WS · always-on ambient
(Stage-2 firmware)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_s2s_gen" edge="1" parent="1" source="s2s" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=10;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.3;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="ivc" value="/v1/voice/*
tools · prompt · convo memory"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_amb_gen" edge="1" parent="1" source="amb" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=10;dashed=1;strokeColor=#999999;fontColor=#999999;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.7;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="ivc" value="graduation API
(deferred)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=26;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;align=left;" value="Legend — what lives in which repo" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="1310" x="40" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_v" parent="leg" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="30" x="20" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_vt" parent="leg" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Public GENesis-Voice repo — firmware + both bridges + deploy/install + docs" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="560" x="60" y="38" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_g" parent="leg" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="30" x="20" y="74" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_gt" parent="leg" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Genesis repo (GENesis-AGI) — internal voice code + cognitive core" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="560" x="60" y="72" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_h" parent="leg" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="30" x="700" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_ht" parent="leg" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Required Home Assistant hardware (Voice PE device + HAOS)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="540" x="740" y="38" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_dt" parent="leg" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#999999;" value="– – – dashed = future / deferred contract (ambient → Genesis graduation API)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="560" x="700" y="72" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
